UI_trait_NL_ByakuganDesc: Possesses the Byakugan. Greatly expands perception and field of vision. +5 Foraging search radius, immunity to weather and darkness foraging penalties, grants canon vision and hearing and empowers you with the gentle fist.
UI_trait_NL_SharinganDesc: Possesses the Sharingan. Evolves through combat: no dodge bonus at 0 kills, then 30%, 60%, and 90% zombie attack evasion at 1, 100, and 500 kills.
UI_trait_NL_SenjuDesc: Possesses the powerful chakra reserves of the Senju. Grants massive endurance reserves and recovery, and suppresses exhaustion warnings.
UI_trait_NL_RinneganDesc: Possesses the Rinnegan. Grants light superior perception for foraging and unlocks Deva Path: Shinra Tensei, a wide force blast that staggers, knocks down, and damages zombies.
